note: Read-only planning. No adapter code added. No dry-run rows generated. No DB writes.
context: P45 merged (cb3aa1a). BIG_LOTTO Wave 3 complete (37960 rows). POWER_LOTTO is next expansion frontier.

powerlotto_pool_constants.description: First zone: 6 numbers from 1-38. Second zone / special: 1 number from 1-8 (separate pool).

current_state_inventory.note: ONLINE production strategy. 1500 verified replay rows. Backfill covers 2014-2026. Edge: +3.16% (300p), Sharpe: 0.090.
ONLINE production strategy. 1570 rows (1500 verified backfill + 70 legacy). Edge: +2.76% (300p), Sharpe: 0.068.

OBSERVATION lifecycle. H6 is a monitoring/alerting framework (h6_report_generator.py, h6_scheduler.py, h6_alert_engine.py, h6_live_monitor.py). Cannot produce predicted_numbers deterministically. Not a prediction strategy.

expansion_candidates.classification_rationale: PP3+FreqOrt 4-bet strategy is referenced in MEMORY.md as active production prediction strategy with RSM edge +3.40% (300p), Sharpe 0.088, perm p=0.000. The Fourier rhythm and frequency orthogonal components are implemented in tools/predict_power_orthogonal_5bet.py (bets 1-3 are Power Precision, bets 4-5 are FreqOrt). Extracting 4-bet slice is LOW effort.
expansion_candidates.recommended_action: Include in P47 Wave 4 POWER_LOTTO bootstrap

expansion_candidates.classification_rationale: midfreq_fourier_2bet appears in MEMORY.md as 'RSM monitored' with 300p edge +0.08%. Registered in registry with lifecycle=RETIRED (DAILY_539 alias), but the POWER_LOTTO variant uses Fourier rhythm + MidFreq signal combination already implemented in power_fourier_rhythm.py. MidFreq+Fourier orthogonal was validated for POWER_LOTTO (edge +2.27%, p=0.005, three-window PASS per MEMORY.md L83).
expansion_candidates.blocking_issues: Needs explicit 2-bet POWER_LOTTO adapter (currently only DAILY_539 variant registered as RETIRED)
expansion_candidates.rsm_evidence: edge300=+0.08% (RSM monitored — marginal but positive, below promotion threshold)
expansion_candidates.recommended_action: Include in P47 Wave 4 POWER_LOTTO bootstrap — classify as WATCH after dry-run

expansion_candidates.classification_rationale: Already in production as power_orthogonal_5bet with 1570 rows. strategy_id naming difference only.

bootstrap_design.description: POWER_LOTTO replay adapter scaffold — analogous to p42_wave3_biglotto_adapters.py but for POWER_LOTTO (1-38 pick-6 + special 1-8 separate pool)
bootstrap_design.second_zone_special: 1 int in [1, 8] (separate pool, NOT same pool as first zone)
bootstrap_design.hit_count_semantics: first zone matches only: len(intersection(predicted_numbers, actual_numbers))
bootstrap_design.special_hit_semantics: predicted_special == actual_special (bool); None/0 when strategy does not predict special
bootstrap_design.cutoff_semantics: All draws in history MUST have date STRICTLY BEFORE target draw date. No future draw data may be used.

adapter_input_contract.history: List[dict] — each dict has 'draw' (str), 'date' (str YYYY/MM/DD), 'numbers' (List[int] of 6 ints in [1,38]), 'special' (int in [1,8])
adapter_input_contract.cutoff_semantics: All draws in history MUST have date STRICTLY BEFORE target draw date.
adapter_input_contract.causal_slice: history = draws[:target_idx] — exclude target draw itself

key_differences_from_biglotto: BIG_LOTTO: 6 from 1-49 + 1 special from 1-49 (SAME pool as first zone)
POWER_LOTTO: 6 from 1-38 (first zone) + 1 from 1-8 (second zone, SEPARATE pool)
POWER_LOTTO first zone: pool=38, significantly smaller than BIG_LOTTO pool=49
POWER_LOTTO special pool=8 (vs BIG_LOTTO special pool=49), special is much easier to predict
Each POWER_LOTTO number appears on average 1912 * 6 / 38 = 301.9 times (vs BIG_LOTTO: 2136 * 6 / 49 = 261.5 times)

prediction_record_schema.target_draw: str — draw number of the predicted draw (TEXT type in DB)
prediction_record_schema.target_date: str — YYYY/MM/DD date of the predicted draw
prediction_record_schema.history_cutoff_draw: str — draw number of last draw used
prediction_record_schema.prediction_cutoff_date: str — date of last draw used (YYYY/MM/DD)
prediction_record_schema.predicted_numbers: JSON str of sorted list of 6 unique ints in [1,38]
prediction_record_schema.predicted_special: int in [1,8] if strategy predicts special; else None
prediction_record_schema.actual_numbers: JSON str of actual 6 first-zone numbers from draw
prediction_record_schema.actual_special: int in [1,8] — actual second-zone special from draw
prediction_record_schema.hit_numbers: JSON str of intersection of predicted_numbers and actual_numbers (first zone only)
prediction_record_schema.hit_count: int — len(hit_numbers) — first zone matches only

bootstrap_design.duplicate_key_semantics: Primary key: lottery_type + target_draw + strategy_id + replay_run_id (per DB UNIQUE constraint)

next_phase_recommendation: P47: POWER_LOTTO Wave 4 dry-run + temp rehearsal
next_phase_rationale: 3 POWER_LOTTO strategies are ready for bootstrap (pp3_freqort_4bet, midfreq_fourier_2bet, midfreq_fourier_mk_3bet). All have RSM evidence, existing tool implementations, and LOW to MEDIUM adapter effort. The 38C6+8 pool is smaller than BIG_LOTTO 49C6, giving better signal detection probability. Bootstrap follows the same governance sequence as P42 (BIG_LOTTO): dry-run → temp rehearsal → production apply → analysis. Estimated 4500 new rows (3 × 1500).

next_phase_candidates.rationale: Highest RSM edge (+3.40%), perm p=0.000, VALIDATED. Direct extension of power_orthogonal_5bet (bets 1-4).
RSM edge +1.83%, MidFreq+Fourier+Markov VALIDATED for POWER_LOTTO (p=0.015). Components all exist.
RSM monitored edge +0.08% marginal but positive. MidFreq+Fourier VALIDATED (edge +2.27%, p=0.005). 2-bet POWER_LOTTO adapter is distinct from DAILY_539 RETIRED variant.

estimated_dryrun_rows: 4500 (3 strategies x 1500 draws each) — ESTIMATE ONLY
p47_must_not_do: No production apply (strategy_prediction_replays dry_run=0) until P47 analysis passes governance
No lifecycle promotion to ONLINE without CTO sign-off
No DB writes to lottery_v2.db main table (only /tmp/p47_temp.db for rehearsal)
